file_insights.lib/core/widgets/virtual_grid_view.dart: Created generic virtual grid widget with configurable cross-axis count, aspect ratio, spacing support, header/footer capabilities, loading/error/empty states, convenience constructors, and full customization options
file_insights.lib/core/widgets/VIRTUAL_GRID_VIEW_READM: Comprehensive documentation covering usage examples, performance considerations, layout configuration, advanced usage, and testing guidelines
Photo model with metadata support, thumbnail fallback, JSON serialization, fixed aspectRatio calculation (width/height), added missing height field, and corrected constructors
file_insights.lib/features/travel/presentation/screens: Photo gallery screen using VirtualGridView<Photo> with responsive layout (2-4 columns), loading/error/empty states, caption overlays, location indicators, sort menu, filter options, and FAB
file_insights.lib/features/travel/presentation/PHOTO_G: Comprehensive documentation including architecture explanation, data flow diagram, usage examples, performance considerations, and testing guidelines
file_insights.test/features/travel/presentation/screen: Performance tests covering empty state, loading state, error state, grid layout, 500+ photo rendering, captions, location indicators, responsive columns, and sort menu functionality

patterns_discovered: Virtual scrolling pattern using only visible item rendering for memory efficiency
Generic widget pattern (VirtualGridView<T>) for reusability across different data types
ConsumerWidget with Riverpod providers for state management
Separation of concerns with dedicated widget classes for complex UI components
Consistent API design with convenience constructors (photoGrid, cardGrid)
Comprehensive documentation strategy with README files for each major component
Responsive design with dynamic column count based on screen size
Gradient overlay for text readability over images
Type-safe models with copyWith methods for immutability
gotchas_discovered: Missing height field in Photo model - initially named incorrectly as sizeInBytes
Aspect ratio calculation bug - was dividing width/width instead of width/height
All Photo constructors and test cases needed updating to include height parameter
Need for proper thumbnail fallback logic (thumbnailUrl ?? imageUrl)
Virtual grid requires proper key management for efficient scrolling
Memory management for image loading in grid views
Responsive column calculation based on screen width constraints

approach_outcome.strategy: Implemented virtualized grid view using custom VirtualGridView widget
approach_outcome.implementation: Created generic widget with configuration options, updated Photo model with proper metadata, built comprehensive gallery screen with responsive layout
approach_outcome.result: SUCCESS - achieved memory-efficient grid rendering for 500+ photos with maintained performance targets

performance_metrics.memory_efficiency: Virtual scrolling renders only visible grid items
performance_metrics.column_range: Responsive 2-4 columns based on screen size
